content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative improvement framework can be augmented by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives central to LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement system that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision while fixing its blind spot of unrecognized single-perspective errors. This hybrid framework would outperform both existing approaches on tasks like code generation and open-ended reasoning by combining iterative refinement with cross-perspective error checking.
